finding_results.notes: Replaced Park Ji-eun with an unnamed lead actress in the Studio B sequence and removed Ji-eun-targeted liability messaging; transfer request now references a generic lead-variance workflow.
Ending now lands material fallout in-scene: recovery trigger arming, stipend reserve freeze, transfer cap, and explicit family rupture language, replacing abstract moral summary as the primary beat.
Added direct Ina-Hyejin-Dohyun confrontation that names the guarantor billing intervention and forces an immediate decision point before chapter close (cancel vs confirm assumption).

Clarified operational path by naming authorizers (Director Kwon countersign, treasury officer), enabling instruments (Clause 4.2, Annex C, workflow addendum), and friction gates (agency legal sign-off, compliance cap review, noon rollback window).

summary: Chapter 2 now preserves continuity (no onstage Ji-eun), makes transfer mechanics legible, pays immediate relational cost through on-page family confrontation, and closes on concrete coercive consequences rather than abstract commentary.
